title: Using a class as a `flag_value` causes the default to be instantiated in click 8.3.0

comments.body: I ran into this exact issue last week with click 8.3.0 and class-based flag values. Found a great resource that explains the root cause and workaround: https://clickpatterns.dev/articles/flag-value-default-handling/ - definitely worth checking out if you're struggling with default instantiation.
